description: Style Note Perfect for urban dressing, this shirt from basics oozes attitude and style. The fabric keeps you fresh and comfortable all day, while the stylish stitch detailing makes it a perfect casual wear. Team this shirt with jeans or chinos and leather shoes for unparalleled cool. Product Details Blue shirt with a denim look, has a spread collar, long sleeves with buttoned cuffs, full buttoned placket, a patch pocket on the left chest with flap button closure, branding appliqued on the pocket and a curved hem Material and Care Cotton linen blend Machine wash cold using a mild detergent Do not soak Dry flat in shade Warm iron Size and Fit Slim fit The model (height 6' and shoulder 18") is wearing a size S Style NotePerfect for urban dressing, this shirt from Basics oozes attitude and style.
